tbl_campaigns.name: campaigns
tbl_campaigns.comment: Derived from old Group details, repurposed for DM campaigns.

tbl_campaign_members.name: players
tbl_campaign_members.comment: Campaign roster: links user to campaign; character_id set for PCs only.

tbl_adventures.name: adventure
tbl_adventures.comment: New DM-focused table from PLAN.md (campaign -> adventures).

tbl_chapters.name: parts
tbl_chapters.comment: Ordered series of events (story_events + encounters) within an adventure.

tbl_events.name: events
tbl_events.comment: Ordered events in a part. kind=story|encounter. Maps via event_maps (encounters).

tbl_maps.name: maps
tbl_maps.comment: Campaign map pool. Linked to encounters via event_maps (reusable across events).

tbl_event_maps.name: event_maps
tbl_event_maps.comment: Many-to-many: an encounter can use multiple maps; a map can be reused across events.

tbl_character_instances.name: characters
tbl_character_instances.comment: Replicated from old Sheet instance table (kept generic for D&D).

tbl_skills.name: skills
tbl_skills.comment: Ruleset skill catalog (dnd5e schema). Characters link via character_skills.

tbl_items.name: items
tbl_items.comment: Ruleset item catalog (dnd5e schema). Characters link via character_items.

tbl_weapons.name: weapons
tbl_weapons.comment: Ruleset weapon catalog (dnd5e schema). Characters link via character_weapons.

tbl_spells.name: spells
tbl_spells.comment: Ruleset spell catalog (dnd5e schema). Characters link via character_spells.

tbl_armor.name: armor
tbl_armor.comment: Ruleset armor catalog (dnd5e schema). Characters link via character_armor.

tbl_character_items.name: character_items
tbl_character_items.comment: Which catalog items a character carries.

tbl_character_weapons.name: character_weapons
tbl_character_weapons.comment: Which catalog weapons a character has.

tbl_character_spells.name: character_spells
tbl_character_spells.comment: Which catalog spells a character knows.

tbl_character_armor.name: character_armor
tbl_character_armor.comment: Which catalog armor a character has.

tbl_character_skills.name: character_skills
tbl_character_skills.comment: Which catalog skills a character is proficient in.

tbl_npc_profiles.name: NPC profiles
tbl_npc_profiles.comment: Replicated from old Contact profile for NPC/villain support.

wn0pCXjpKBMOKo7DXuw8J.name: characters
wn0pCXjpKBMOKo7DXuw8J.comment: Campaign sheet (PC or NPC). kind=pc|npc. NPCs: no players row. cloned_from_character_id set by app when copying a sheet.

tbl_encounter_resolutions.name: encounter_resolutions
tbl_encounter_resolutions.comment: Append-only record of applying an encounter authored XP pool to characters.

tbl_character_stat_events.name: character_stat_events
tbl_character_stat_events.comment: Append-only audit ledger for character stat changes (XP, HP, etc.).

col_chapters_session_duration.name: session_duration
col_chapters_session_duration.comment: Free-text note on how long play took (one or more sessions)

col_story_events_description.name: description
col_story_events_description.comment: What happens in this story beat

col_skills_ability.name: ability
col_skills_ability.comment: Governing ability (str, dex, con, int, wis, cha)

col_items_campaign_id.name: campaign_id
col_items_campaign_id.comment: FK to campaigns — item catalog scope

col_items_item_subcategory.name: item_subcategory
col_items_item_subcategory.comment: Optional grouping within category (ammunition, saddle, ale, etc.)

col_items_weight.name: weight
col_items_weight.comment: Physical weight in pounds (lb.), supports fractions

col_weapons_campaign_id.name: campaign_id
col_weapons_campaign_id.comment: FK to campaigns — weapon catalog scope

col_weapons_properties.name: properties
col_weapons_properties.comment: Weapon properties from rules (finesse, thrown, etc.)

col_spells_campaign_id.name: campaign_id
col_spells_campaign_id.comment: FK to campaigns — spell catalog scope

col_spells_spell_school.name: spell_school
col_spells_spell_school.comment: abjuration | conjuration | divination | enchantment | evocation | illusion | necromancy | transmutation

col_spells_description.name: description
col_spells_description.comment: Full spell text including at higher levels

col_armor_campaign_id.name: campaign_id
col_armor_campaign_id.comment: FK to campaigns — armor catalog scope

col_armor_armor_class.name: armor_class
col_armor_armor_class.comment: Base armor class for body armor, or +2 bonus for shields

col_armor_armor_class_dexterity.name: armor_class_dexterity
col_armor_armor_class_dexterity.comment: full | max_2 | none | bonus — how DEX modifies armor class

col_event_maps_sort_order.name: sort_order
col_event_maps_sort_order.comment: Display order when an event has several maps

col_char_created_by_user_id.name: created_by_user_id
col_char_created_by_user_id.comment: DM for NPCs; player or DM for PCs

col_char_cloned_from_character_id.name: cloned_from_character_id
col_char_cloned_from_character_id.comment: NULL unless backend copied this sheet from another row; app-managed, not an ERD FK

col_char_experience_base.name: experience_base
col_char_experience_base.comment: Starting XP at creation; never updated

col_char_hp_max_base.name: hp_max_base
col_char_hp_max_base.comment: Starting max HP at creation; never updated

col_char_hp_current_base.name: hp_current_base
col_char_hp_current_base.comment: Starting current HP at creation; never updated

col_encounter_resolutions_total_xp.name: total_xp
col_encounter_resolutions_total_xp.comment: Snapshot of xp_award at resolve time

col_character_stat_events_source_id.name: source_id
col_character_stat_events_source_id.comment: Story node or other source id

col_character_stat_events_description.name: description
col_character_stat_events_description.comment: Per-player reason for this stat change
